---
title: "FPREN Daily Summary Report"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: false
    latex_engine: xelatex
  html_document:
    theme: cerulean
    toc: true
params:
  date_from: ""
  date_to: ""
  mongo_uri: "mongodb://localhost:27017/"
  zone_label: "All Florida"
  include_weather: true
  include_traffic: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(mongolite)
  library(dplyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(lubridate)
  library(knitr)
})

MONGO_URI <- params$mongo_uri
DB_NAME   <- "weather_rss"

fpren_col <- function(col) mongolite::mongo(collection = col, db = DB_NAME, url = MONGO_URI)

# Date window
report_date <- if (nchar(params$date_to) > 0) as.Date(params$date_to) else Sys.Date()
start_date  <- if (nchar(params$date_from) > 0) as.Date(params$date_from) else report_date - 1
start_iso   <- format(as.POSIXct(start_date), "%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z", tz = "UTC")
end_iso     <- format(as.POSIXct(report_date + 1), "%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z", tz = "UTC")

# ── Load alerts ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
alerts <- tryCatch({
  col <- fpren_col("nws_alerts")
  q   <- sprintf('{"fetched_at":{"$gte":{"$date":"%s"},"$lt":{"$date":"%s"}}}',
                 start_iso, end_iso)
  df  <- col$find(q, fields = '{"event":1,"headline":1,"severity":1,"area_desc":1,"fetched_at":1}')
  col$disconnect()
  df
}, error = function(e) data.frame())

# ── Load processed alerts ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
alerts_proc <- tryCatch({
  col <- fpren_col("alerts_processed")
  q   <- sprintf('{"inserted_at":{"$gte":{"$date":"%s"},"$lt":{"$date":"%s"}}}',
                 start_iso, end_iso)
  df  <- col$find(q, fields = '{"summary":1,"severity":1,"source":1,"inserted_at":1}')
  col$disconnect()
  df
}, error = function(e) data.frame())

# ── Load traffic ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
traffic <- if (params$include_traffic) {
  tryCatch({
    col <- fpren_col("fl_traffic")
    q   <- sprintf('{"fetched_at":{"$gte":{"$date":"%s"},"$lt":{"$date":"%s"}}}',
                   start_iso, end_iso)
    df  <- col$find(q, fields = '{"event_type":1,"road":1,"county":1,"severity":1,"fetched_at":1}')
    col$disconnect()
    df
  }, error = function(e) data.frame())
} else data.frame()

# ── Load weather ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
weather <- if (params$include_weather) {
  tryCatch({
    col <- fpren_col("weather_history")
    q   <- sprintf('{"timestamp":{"$gte":{"$date":"%s"},"$lt":{"$date":"%s"}}}',
                   start_iso, end_iso)
    df  <- col$find(q, fields = '{"icao":1,"city":1,"temp_f":1,"wind_speed_kt":1,"flight_category":1,"timestamp":1}')
    col$disconnect()
    df
  }, error = function(e) data.frame())
} else data.frame()

# ── Alarm summary ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
alarm_counts <- tryCatch({
  col <- fpren_col("alarms")
  q   <- sprintf('{"created_at":{"$gte":{"$date":"%s"},"$lt":{"$date":"%s"}}}',
                 start_iso, end_iso)
  df  <- col$find(q, fields = '{"severity":1,"status":1}')
  col$disconnect()
  df
}, error = function(e) data.frame())
```

---

**Report Date:** `r format(report_date, "%B %d, %Y")` | **Zone:** `r params$zone_label` | **Period:** `r start_date` to `r report_date`

---

## Alert Summary

```{r alert-summary}
n_alerts <- nrow(alerts)
n_proc   <- nrow(alerts_proc)

cat(sprintf("**%d** raw alerts fetched | **%d** processed through agent pipeline\n\n",
            n_alerts, n_proc))

if (n_alerts > 0 && "event" %in% names(alerts)) {
  tbl <- alerts %>%
    group_by(event = as.character(event)) %>%
    summarise(Count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(desc(Count)) %>%
    head(15)
  knitr::kable(tbl, caption = "Top Alert Types (last 24 hours)", align = "lr")
} else {
  cat("No alerts in this period.\n")
}
```

```{r alert-severity}
if (n_proc > 0 && "severity" %in% names(alerts_proc)) {
  sev_tbl <- alerts_proc %>%
    mutate(severity = as.character(severity)) %>%
    group_by(Severity = severity) %>%
    summarise(Count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    arrange(desc(Count))
  knitr::kable(sev_tbl, caption = "Processed Alert Severity Distribution")
}
```

---

## Weather Conditions

```{r weather-summary}
if (params$include_weather && nrow(weather) > 0 && "city" %in% names(weather)) {
  wx_latest <- weather %>%
    mutate(city = as.character(city)) %>%
    group_by(city) %>%
    slice_tail(n = 1) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    arrange(city) %>%
    select(City = city,
           `Temp (°F)` = temp_f,
           `Wind (kt)` = wind_speed_kt,
           `Flight Cat` = flight_category)
  knitr::kable(wx_latest, caption = "Latest Weather Conditions by City")
} else {
  cat("No weather data in this period.\n")
}
```

```{r flight-cat-chart, fig.height=3}
if (params$include_weather && nrow(weather) > 0 && "flight_category" %in% names(weather)) {
  cat_colors <- c(VFR = "#27ae60", MVFR = "#3498db", IFR = "#e67e22", LIFR = "#c0392b", UNK = "#95a5a6")
  fc_tbl <- weather %>%
    mutate(flight_category = as.character(flight_category)) %>%
    count(flight_category) %>%
    mutate(flight_category = factor(flight_category,
                                     levels = c("VFR","MVFR","IFR","LIFR","UNK")))
  ggplot(fc_tbl, aes(x = flight_category, y = n, fill = flight_category)) +
    geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cat_colors, na.value = "#95a5a6") +
    labs(title = "Flight Category Distribution", x = "Category", y = "Observation Count") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11)
}
```

---

## Traffic Incidents

```{r traffic-summary}
if (params$include_traffic && nrow(traffic) > 0) {
  cat(sprintf("**%d** traffic incidents reported in period.\n\n", nrow(traffic)))
  if ("county" %in% names(traffic)) {
    cnty_tbl <- traffic %>%
      mutate(county = as.character(county)) %>%
      filter(county != "") %>%
      count(County = county) %>%
      arrange(desc(n)) %>%
      rename(Incidents = n) %>%
      head(10)
    knitr::kable(cnty_tbl, caption = "Traffic Incidents by County (Top 10)")
  }
} else {
  cat("No traffic incidents in this period.\n")
}
```

---

## System Alarms

```{r alarm-summary}
if (nrow(alarm_counts) > 0 && "severity" %in% names(alarm_counts)) {
  alm_tbl <- alarm_counts %>%
    mutate(severity = as.character(severity)) %>%
    count(Severity = severity) %>%
    arrange(desc(n)) %>%
    rename(Count = n)
  knitr::kable(alm_tbl, caption = "Alarms Raised in Period")
} else {
  cat("No alarms raised in this period.\n")
}
```

---

*Generated by FPREN — Florida Public Radio Emergency Network*
*`r format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M %Z")`*
